chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH C،P No BENCH AT SUKKUR 0-1376 0f 2023 Date Order with signature Of Judge For orders on office objections For orders on CMA No.5S19 /2023 For orders on CMA No.5872/2023 For hearing of CMA No.5816/2023 For hearing of main case 01.02.2024 Mr Mehfooz Ahmed Awan Advocate for Respondent No 2 Mr. Ateeq-ur Rehman Soomro, Advocate for Respondent No g Mr Ali Raza Balouch AAG H ٣ 4 44 4 + ٦ » ؛ ٢ 4+ Learned Counsel for Respondent No2 submits that the order dated 19O9 2O23 has been complied with and nothing is left in this petition to be decided by this Court Be that it may petitioners and their Counsel are called absent and therefore, this petition is dismissed for non prosecution
